arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford looks glum as he is spotted leaving Man United training in chauffeur-driven £200k Bentley for first time since bombshell interview revealing he wants to move
arts.sum: After leaving Carrington the England international could be seen wearing a Nike-branded hat, whilst sitting in the backseat of a chauffeur-driven Bentley Flying Spur Azure.

arts.ttl: Manchester United face immediate Marcus Rashford transfer problem as left-back enquiry made
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United transfer news and rumours as the January transfer window is just days away from officially opening.

arts.ttl: Ex-Newcastle footballer Michael Newberry dies suddenly aged just 27 as club pay tribute
arts.sum: Michael Newberry's club Cliftonville confirmed the shock news by saying they were "devastated" by his sudden passing as they extended their condolences to the player's family

arts.ttl: Barcelona learn massive asking price for Newcastle star
arts.sum: The board at La Liga giants Barcelona have this week been made aware of the sum which they will need to part with, in the hopes of landing Newcastle United…

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham and Newcastle open talks to sign the fastest defender in France
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively reveal that Tottenham and Newcastle United have both opened talks over a possible deal for Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov. The two...

arts.ttl: Talks taking place: Ruben Amorim pushing for Man United to complete potential €18m transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is reportedly pushing for the potential transfer of Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen. The Denmark international looks highly likely to leave Barca in the near future, with the current expectation being that he could leave on an initial loan with a view to a permanent €18m transfer. That’s according to a […] The post Talks taking place: Ruben Amorim pushing for Man United to complete potential €18m transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Romano teases BOMBSHELL Man Utd transfer for top target
arts.sum: Manchester United target Milos Kerkez has signed with a new agency as he gears up for a 2025 transfer, according to Fabrizio Romano. However, the Red Devils did not have the necessary funds left over to strengthen that position and had to put off a transfer.

arts.ttl: How Man United could line up against Newcastle without Manuel Ugarte and Bruno Fernandes
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Newcastle United on Monday but they will be without Bruno Fernandes and Manuel Ugarte

arts.ttl: 'I saw the Man Utd dressing room hierarchy among players with my own eyes'
arts.sum: A lack of leadership in the Manchester United dressing room has hurt Ruben Amorim's start at the club - but one Old Trafford icon recounted how it can lead to players getting special treatment

arts.ttl: Six Man Utd players free to talk to overseas clubs on January 1 as Ruben Amorim faces headache
arts.sum: Manchester United have six players who will be free to talk to non-English clubs next month and the Red Devils will need to make some big decisions about their futures
